author: śrīla narottama⋅dāsa ṭhākura
verses:
prabhu he, eibāra karaha karuṇā
jugala-caraṇa dekhi’, saphala kariba ā̐khi,
ei mora manera kāmanā

nija⋅padasevā dibā, nāhi more upekhibā,
du̐hu pa̐hu karuṇāsāgara
du̐hu vinu nāhi jāno, ei baḍa bhāgya māno,
muñi baḍa patita pāmara

lalitā⋅ādeśa pāñā, caraṇa seviba jāñā,
priyasakhī⋅saṅge haya mane
du̐hu dātā śiromaṇi, ati dīna more jāni’,
nikaṭe caraṇa dibe dāne

pāba rādhā⋅kṛṣṇa⋅pā, ghucibe manera ghā,
dūre jābe esaba vikala
narottama⋅dāse kaya, ei vāñchā siddhi haya,
deha⋅prāṇa⋅sakala saphala
en_translation:
O Lord, be merciful this time. Seeing the feet of the Couple, I will make my eyes successful; this is the desire of my mind.

Give me service to Your own feet, do not neglect me; Both Lords are oceans of mercy. I do not know anything without Both of You; I consider this a great fortune. I am very fallen and sinful.

Receiving the order of Lalitā, going to serve the feet—this is in my mind, in the company of the dear sakhīs. Both are the crest-jewels of givers; knowing me to be very lowly, They will give Their feet nearby in charity.

I will get the feet of Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa, the wound of the mind will be healed; all this distress will go away. Narottama Dāsa says: This desire is fulfilled; body, life—everything is successful.
